info.title: Massive
info.description: The missing services for agent-first development.

get.description: Retrieve search results or queue a search for later retrieval.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by this endpoint of the queued search to retrieve; if given, all other params are ignored; either an ID or terms are required.

parameters.name: terms
parameters.description: The broad or exact word or phrase to query (e.g., `foo bar baz` or `"foo bar baz"`); the terms require [form or URL encoding](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Percent-encoding) (with any space character being replaced by a `+` character or `%20` sequence); either terms or an ID are required.

parameters.name: engine
parameters.description: The search engine to use.

parameters.name: serps
parameters.description: The number of results pages to fetch.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The number of results per page to fetch; page size is unset by default.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The number of initial results to skip; results aren’t offset by default.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](search/devices) of the device to emulate searching on (these names are case insensitive but must include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); device emulation is unused by default.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to search from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

parameters.name: subdivision
parameters.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to search from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to search from (these names are temporarily case sensitive and required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); a random city is used by default.

parameters.name: uule
parameters.description: The [proprietary encoded string](https://moz.com/blog/geolocation-the-ultimate-tip-to-emulate-local-search) for emulating the location to search from; if possible, the actual location is searched from not emulated; location emulation is unused by default.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: The commonly spelled name, [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php), or [Google code](https://www.google.com/advanced_search) of the language to search in (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the language is unset by default.

parameters.name: display
parameters.description: The commonly spelled name, [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php), or [Google code](https://www.google.com/advanced_search) of the search interface’s display language (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the display language is unset by default or set to the language if given.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The encoded URL of the results page to retrieve; if given, the URL overrides any of the above params.

parameters.name: awaiting
parameters.description: The lazy result features to wait to load; any AI overview, which can take significant time to generate, is awaited for a maximum of **1 minute**; multiple features can be provided by repeating the key; lazy results aren’t awaited by default.

parameters.name: expiration
parameters.description: The age in days of when to consider cached results expired, where `0` disables caching.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The synchronous or asynchronous mode of results retrieval (retrieve async results by providing the returned ID).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The encoded HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the (prerequisite) async results have been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier or the search status.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the queued search with.

status.description: The status of the queued search.

get.description: Retrieve the results or status of a queued search – use `GET /search?id=...`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [search endpoint](../search) of the queued search to retrieve.

status.description: The status of the queued search.

post.description: Queue multiple searches for later retrieval.

terms.description: The broad or exact words or phrases to query (e.g., `foo bar baz` or `"foo bar baz"`).

serps.description: The number of results pages to fetch.

size.description: The number of results per page to fetch; page size is unset by default.

offset.description: The number of initial results to skip; results aren’t offset by default.

device.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](devices) of the device to emulate searching on (these names are case insensitive); device emulation is unused by default.

country.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to search from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

subdivision.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to search from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

city.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to search from (these names are temporarily case sensitive); a random city is used by default.

uule.description: The [proprietary encoded string](https://moz.com/blog/geolocation-the-ultimate-tip-to-emulate-local-search) for emulating the location to search from; if possible, the actual location is searched from not emulated; location emulation is unused by default.

language.description: The commonly spelled name, [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php), or [Google code](https://www.google.com/advanced_search) of the language to search in (these names and codes are case insensitive); the language is unset by default.

display.description: The commonly spelled name, [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php), or [Google code](https://www.google.com/advanced_search) of the search interface’s display language (these names and codes are case insensitive); the display language is unset by default or set to the language if given.

urls.description: The URLs of the results pages to retrieve; if given, the URLs override any of the above params.

awaiting.description: The lazy result features to wait to load; any AI overview, which can take significant time to generate, is awaited for a maximum of **1 minute**; multiple features can be provided by repeating the key; lazy results aren’t awaited by default.

expiration.description: The age in days of when to consider cached results expired, where `0` disables caching.

callback.description: The HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the batch results have been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier and confirmation count.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the batch searches with.

count.description: The number of queries in the batch as confirmed by the API.

get.description: Retrieve the status of batch searches.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [batch search endpoint](../batching) of the bulk searches to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve an LLM completion or queue a conversation for later retrieval.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by this endpoint of the queued conversation to retrieve; if given, all other params are ignored; either an ID or prompt is required.

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.description: The question or instruction to use as a chat prompt; the prompt requires [form or URL encoding](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Percent-encoding) (with any space character being replaced by a `+` character or `%20` sequence); either a prompt or ID is required.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The AI model to chat with.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](ai/devices) of the device to emulate chatting on (these names are case insensitive but must include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); device emulation is unused by default.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to chat from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

parameters.name: subdivision
parameters.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to chat from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to chat from (these names are temporarily case sensitive and required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); a random city is used by default.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: [Planned] The commonly spelled name or [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php) of the language to chat in (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the language is unset by default.

parameters.name: display
parameters.description: [Planned] The commonly spelled name or [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php) of the chat interface’s display language (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the display language is unset by default or set to the language if given.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format to output to.

parameters.name: expiration
parameters.description: The age in days of when to consider a cached completion expired, where `0` disables caching.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The synchronous or asynchronous mode of completion retrieval (retrieve an async completion by providing the returned ID).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The encoded HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the (prerequisite) async completion has been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier or the conversation status.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the queued conversation with.

status.description: The status of the queued conversation.

get.description: Retrieve the completion or status of a queued conversation – use `GET /ai?id=...`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [AI endpoint](../ai) of the queued conversation to retrieve.

status.description: The status of the queued conversation.

post.description: Queue multiple LLM conversations for later retrieval.

prompts.description: The questions or instructions to use as chat prompts.
example: Where can I buy a vintage guitar?
Help me find guitar repair shops nearby.
Do any local stores sell vinyl records?

model.description: The AI model to chat with.

device.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](devices) of the device to emulate chatting on (these names are case insensitive but must include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); device emulation is unused by default.

country.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to chat from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

subdivision.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to chat from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

city.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to chat from (these names are temporarily case sensitive and required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); a random city is used by default.

language.description: [Planned] The commonly spelled name or [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php) of the language to chat in (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the language is unset by default.

display.description: [Planned] The commonly spelled name or [two-letter ISO code](https://www.loc.gov/standards/iso639-2/php/code_list.php) of the chat interface’s display language (these names and codes are case insensitive but required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); the display language is unset by default or set to the language if given.

expiration.description: The age in days of when to consider a cached completion expired, where `0` disables caching.

callback.description: The HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the batch completions have been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier and confirmation count.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the batch conversations with.

count.description: The number of prompts in the batch as confirmed by the API.

get.description: Retrieve the status of batch conversations.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [batch AI endpoint](../batching) of the bulk conversations to retrieve.

get.description: Retrieve web content or queue a request for later retrieval; connect to `wss://render.joinmassive.com/browser` for CDP interaction.

x-websocket.description: Interact with webpages by connecting Puppeteer, Playwright, or another CDP-compatible automation framework.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by this endpoint of the queued request to retrieve; if given, all other params are ignored; either an ID or URL is required.

parameters.name: url
parameters.description: The URL of the page to browse; any unsafe characters require [URL encoding](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Glossary/Percent-encoding); either a URL or ID is required.

parameters.name: difficulty
parameters.description: The difficulty pool to attempt to access the URL from.

parameters.name: speed
parameters.description: The speed to attempt to access the URL at, where `ridiculous` is 30 percent faster on average than `light` speed.

parameters.name: device
parameters.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](browser/devices) of the device to emulate browsing on (these names are case insensitive but must include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); device emulation is unused by default.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to browse from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

parameters.name: subdivision
parameters.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to browse from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

parameters.name: city
parameters.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to browse from (these names are temporarily case sensitive and required to include form- or URL-encoded spaces and punctuation marks); a random city is used by default.

parameters.name: captcha
parameters.description: The intended resolution of any detected captcha, where `rejected` results in a `403` response.

parameters.name: readiness
parameters.description: The standard ready event to await before snapshotting browsed content.

parameters.name: delay
parameters.description: The number of supplemental seconds to delay before snapshotting browsed content; no delay is used by default.

parameters.name: format
parameters.description: The format to output to.

parameters.name: expiration
parameters.description: The age in days of when to consider cached content expired, where `0` disables caching.

parameters.name: mode
parameters.description: The synchronous or asynchronous mode of content retrieval (retrieve async content by providing the returned ID).

parameters.name: callback
parameters.description: The encoded HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the (prerequisite) async content has been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier or the request status.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the queued request with.

status.description: The status of the queued request.

get.description: Retrieve the content or status of a queued request – use `GET /browser?id=...`.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [browser endpoint](../browser) of the queued request to retrieve.

status.description: The status of the queued request.

post.description: Queue multiple web requests for later retrieval.

urls.description: The URLs of the pages to browse.

difficulty.description: The difficulty pool to attempt to access the URLs from.

speed.description: The speed to attempt to access the URLs at, where `ridiculous` is 30 percent faster on average than `light` speed.

device.description: The name as returned by the [devices resource](devices) of the device to emulate browsing on (these names are case insensitive); device emulation is unused by default.

country.description: The [two-letter ISO code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) of the country to browse from (these codes are case insensitive); a random country is used by default.

subdivision.description: The alphanumeric second part (proceeding the separator) of a [first-level subdivision code](https://www.iso.org/obp/ui/#search/code) in the (prerequisite) country to browse from (these codes are case insensitive); a random subdivision is used by default.

city.description: The [commonly spelled name](https://www.geonames.org/) of the city in the (prerequisite) country to browse from (these names are temporarily case sensitive); a random city is used by default.

captcha.description: The intended resolution of any detected captcha, where `rejected` results in a `403` response.

readiness.description: The standard ready event to await before snapshotting browsed content.

delay.description: The number of supplemental seconds to delay before snapshotting browsed content; no delay is used by default.

expiration.description: The age in days of when to consider cached content expired, where `0` disables caching.

callback.description: The HTTP or HTTPS callback URL or Amazon SQS queue URL or ARN to notify when the batch content has been retrieved; any SQS queue must grant `sqs:SendMessage` permission to the `arn:aws:iam::180363035301:role/api-instance` AWS principal.

202.description: A job identifier and confirmation count.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the batch content with.

count.description: The number of requests in the batch as confirmed by the API.

get.description: Retrieve the status of batch requests.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The identifier returned by the [batch browser endpoint](../batching) of the bulk requests to retrieve.

email.description: The email address of the user to create an account for; the address is case insensitive and can be in any character encoding.

credits.description: The number of API credits to preload the account with.

email.description: The email address of the new account as recorded by the API.

token.description: The bearer token issued to the account for authentication.

credits.description: The number of initial credits granted to the account.

get.description: Retrieve the settings and credits of one or more accounts.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: The (case-insensitive) email address of the user whose profile to fetch; multiple addresses can be provided by repeating the key; profiles for all addresses are fetched by default.

credits.description: The number of remaining API credits allocated to the account.

email.description: The (case-insensitive) email address of the user whose account to grant credits.

amount.description: The number of additional API credits to grant the account.

credits.description: The number of updated API credits allocated to the account.

email.description: The (case-insensitive) email address of the user whose account to deactivate.

credits.description: The zeroed-out credits as confirmed by the API.

get.description: Retrieve the settings and remaining credits of an account.

credits.description: The number of remaining credits allocated to the account.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: The [ISO datetime](https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime) to select data starting from, inclusively.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: The [ISO datetime](https://www.w3.org/TR/NOTE-datetime) to select data up to, inclusively.

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: **[Whitelabelers only]** The (case-insensitive) email address of the user whose data to select; multiple addresses can be provided by repeating the key; data for all addresses is selected by default.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: The service to select data for; multiple services can be provided by repeating the key; data for all services is selected by default.

parameters.name: by
parameters.description: The time unit to group the data by.

email.description: The email address of the user whose data is selected.

from.description: The ISO datetime of the first datapoint.

to.description: The ISO datetime of the last datapoint.

service.description: The service included in the data.

result.description: The type of result included in the data.

calls.description: The number of API calls of the service and result type.

credits.description: The number of credits consumed by the API calls.

meanSecs.description: The average number of elapsed seconds of the API calls.

terms.description: The broad or exact query terms.

pageCount.description: The number of retrieved results pages.

pageSize.description: The number of retrieved results per page.

approxResultsCount.description: The approximate number of indexed results.

resultsOffset.description: The number of skipped initial results.

country.description: The ISO code of the targeted country.

subdivision.description: The partial ISO code of the targeted subdivision in the country.

city.description: The common name of the targeted city in the country.

uule.description: The encoded string of the emulated location.

language.description: The common name, ISO code, or Google code of the targeted language.

display.description: The common name, ISO code, or Google code of the targeted display language.

model.description: The AI model that generated the completion.

query.description: The user prompt that the completion was generated for.

html.description: The rendered HTML of the entire conversation.

prompt.description: The rendered HTML of just the prompt portion of the conversation.

completion.description: The rendered HTML of just the completion portion of the conversation.

sources.description: The rendered HTML of just the sources portion of the conversation.

ads.description: The rendered HTML of just the ads portion of the conversation.

sse.description: [ChatGPT only] The server-sent events JSON that was used to populate the conversation HTML.

fanouts.description: [ChatGPT only] The fanout queries that the model searched to generate the completion; only some models expose these queries.
example: best basketball shoes for wide feet 2026

device.description: The name of the targeted emulated device.

country.description: The ISO code of the targeted country.

subdivision.description: The partial ISO code of the targeted subdivision in the country.

city.description: The common name of the targeted city in the country.

language.description: [Planned] The common name or ISO code of the targeted language.

display.description: [Planned] The common name or ISO code of the targeted display language.

id.description: The identifier to retrieve the batch job with.

status.description: The status of the batch job.

successful.description: The number of successful requests in the batch.

failed.description: The number of failed requests in the batch.

url.description: The URL of the archived requests, which is available on job completion.

schema.example: Valid API token must be provided
Credit balance is 0; top up at https://dashboard.joinmassive.com/plans

paramsError.description: One or more parameters were invalid.

schema.example: Character counts must be no more than 255

conflictError.description: One or more resources already exists.

schema.example: Rate limit was exceeded; please retry in 180 seconds

unsupportedError.description: One or more resources is nonexistant.

schema.example: Service is autoscaling; please retry in 60 seconds
